news.title: U.S. begins blockade of Strait of Hormuz
news.summary: The U.S. blockade would apply to "any and all Ships trying to enter, or leave, the Strait of Hormuz," President Donald Trump said.

news.title: Goldman Sachs tops estimates on record equities trading — here's why the stock is falling
news.summary: Goldman Sachs posted record equities trading revenue for the first quarter. The overall firm to its second-highest quarterly revenue. Goldman Sachs posted a record $1.2 billion in first-quarter revenue.

news.title: Revolution Medicines says its potential breakthrough pancreatic cancer drug succeeds in late-stage trial
news.summary: Revolution Medicines' drug for pancreatic cancer succeeds in a highly anticipated Phase 3 trial. The drug is the first of its kind to be approved in the U.S.

news.title: Judge dismisses Trump defamation lawsuit against Murdoch, WSJ about Epstein letter
news.summary: Trump denies sending a bawdy 50th birthday letter to his then-friend Jeffrey Epstein. The letter was sent at the request of Ghislaine Maxwell.

news.title: OpenAI touts Amazon alliance in memo, says Microsoft has 'limited our ability' to reach clients
news.summary: OpenAI's new revenue chief points to the artificial intelligence company's ongoing effort to reduce its reliance on Microsoft. In an internal memo, Open AI's new Revenue Chief pointed to the company's efforts to reduce reliance onMicrosoft.

news.title: Trump’s blockade takes effect. Here’s why stocks are only off modestly for now.
news.summary: The U.S. military is implementing a blockade on all ships entering and exiting Iranian ports. President Donald Trump and the Pentagon both said the blockade would be starting at 10 a.m. Eastern.

news.title: Private credit not only won’t spark a financial crisis — it may be more stable than your bank
news.summary: With 65% equity cushions and 10-year lockups, Wall Street’s ‘anti-banks’ won’t face a ‘Lehman moment’

news.title: Why ‘Rule of 10’ stocks like Nvidia and Meta are now poised for a comeback, according to Goldman Sachs
news.summary: Higher bond yields have been hitting secular growth stocks, but that may be about to change. Higher bond yields may be hitting secular Growth stocks, too.

news.title: My friend’s girlfriend went ‘ballistic’ after he gave his kids $19,000 a year. Is this a red flag?
news.summary: “He spent $1,000 on his girlfriend at Christmas and several hundred dollars on each of her children,” the woman said.

news.title: The best places to invest now are Chinese tech stocks and this out-of-fashion sector, according to Bank of America
news.summary: Bank of America’s Michael Hartnett reckons the stock market is now too big to fail. So no rate increases before the midterms and a Sino-American detente in May.
